title: oplismenus albus
intro: Oplismenus albus, also known as white false dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oplismenus albus are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
